2605.27921.title: Show, Don't TELL: Explainable AI-Generated Text Detection
2605.27921.paper_summary: Research on AI-generated text detection has presented a number of approaches to discern human from AI prose, some of which achieving high in-distribution performance. However, real-world applicability has stalled because their outputs are misaligned with the needs of users, such as professors, who are presented with a numeric score that has no attached explanation. We tackle this issue with a novel architecture, TELL, that bakes explainability from the ground-up. While our system still offers a numerical score like other detectors for comparability, TELL takes a fundamentally different approach where we aim to show the user the "tells" by which the model believes a text is AI or human-written, to empower the user to decide who wrote a text using their own judgment and understanding of the context of the writing and its alleged author. We train TELL on a custom SFT dataset of domain-specific authorship annotations, and further refine the system using GRPO with curriculum learning to improve performance. We achieve competitive performance with state-of-the-art detectors (AUROC 0.927) while natively providing annotations that explain the basis for the detector's decision. We further evaluate the quality of our explanations using a dataset of human annotations and report a high (mean 72.3%) win-rate on annotation concreteness, falsifiability, coherence, plausibility and grounding, allowing users to critically think and decide for themselves. Our work thus reframes the problem of AI-generated text detection in a human-centric perspective and paves the way for a new family of detectors that focus on native explainability.
2605.27921.paper_summary_zh: 研究顯示，AI生成文本檢測的研究提出了多種方法來區分人類與AI的文體，其中一些在分布內的表現相當出色。<lb/>然而，由於其輸出與用戶的需求（例如教授）不匹配，這些方法在現實世界中的應用停滯不前，因為用戶得到的僅僅是一個沒有附加解釋的數字分數。<lb/>我們通過一種新穎的架構TELL來解決這一問題，該架構從根本上融入了解釋性。<lb/>雖然我們的系統仍然提供一個數字分數以便於比較，但TELL採取了根本不同的方法，我們旨在向用戶展示模型認為文本是AI或人類撰寫的“跡象”，以使用戶能夠根據自己的判斷和對寫作及其所謂作者的上下文理解來決定誰撰寫了文本。<lb/>我們在一個自定義的SFT數據集上訓練TELL，該數據集包含特定領域的作者標註，並進一步使用GRPO和課程學習來精細調整系統以提高性能。<lb/>我們在性能上達到了與最先進的檢測器相當的水平（AUROC 0.927），同時原生提供解釋檢測器決策基礎的註釋。<lb/>我們進一步使用人類標註數據集評估我們解釋的質量，並報告在標註的具體性、可證偽性、一致性、合理性和基礎上有高達72.3%的平均勝率，讓用戶能夠進行批判性思考並自行決定。<lb/>因此，我們的工作從以人為中心的角度重新框定了AI生成文本檢測的問題，並為專注於原生解釋性的新的檢測器系列鋪平了道路。
2605.27921.author: Aldan Creo et.al.
